heading: Omitted
label: 455 to 456h Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 455 to 456h, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 455, , , , related to definitions as used in sections 455 to 455e of this title.Pub. L. 85–303, § 371 Stat. 624Sept. 7, 1957Section 455c, , , , related to rights retained by the United States.Pub. L. 85–303, § 471 Stat. 625Sept. 7, 1957Section 455d, , , , provided that prior claims be unaffected by sections 455 to 455e of this title.Pub. L. 85–303, § 571 Stat. 625Sept. 7, 1957Section 455e, , , , provided for a survey of community boundaries and establishment of pierhead lines.Pub.
